flow.name: panchang_day_context
flow.output: Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Paksha, Vara, festival/observance/theme context

flow.name: morphology_engine
flow.output: possible Sanskrit forms/roots/stems/valid forms from sourced lexical records

flow.name: semantics_engine
flow.output: meaning, semantic range, usage boundary, reflective sense

flow.name: primary_or_fallback_selection
flow.input: approved lexical candidate or fallback candidate

flow.name: duplicate_control
flow.output: final eligible word or replacement candidate

flow.name: datewise_result_saving
flow.output: daily word history record and subscriber archive candidate
